_comment: Copy to autoresearch.config.json (gitignored). Claude's nightly configurator scheduled task refreshes the experiments queue and budgets; the standalone runner (node scripts/autoresearch.mjs) consumes it unattended. See docs/RECIPES.md → 'Nightly Auto-Research Outer Loop'.

experiments.hypothesis: Parsing the [Labels: ...] block with a precompiled regex (instead of re-creating it per ticket line) speeds up Board.listTasks on large boards.
Deferring full description string assembly until a ticket is actually returned (compact path skips it) reduces listTasks time.
experiments.hint: server/storage.js listTasks + the compact view in server/register/tasks.js
